claims: One owner-only Issue-comment ingress is implemented for Mission #257.
The ingress validates exact repository, Issue, owner, current-main base, Athena Spear route, replay identity, closed schema, bounded size, and public-clean content before output.
The hosted workflow invokes only tools.sunset_router preview for lifecycle execution and keeps all request and Preview artifacts in system temporary storage.
A successful run returns the exact lifecycle Preview, Router receipt, their digests, replay binding, and a separate Jayson approval command to Mission #257.
forbidden_claims: No live Preview has been generated or approved by this source candidate.

No lifecycle candidate, source branch, publication PR, READY, MERGE, settings, runtime, Quest advancement, operator transfer, route retirement, standing authority, or SUNSET COMPLETE claim is made by the ingress.
rollback: Before merge, close the exact PR. After merge, use one reviewed revert or repair-forward PR; never rewrite history.
next_safe_action: Open one draft PR, run full cross-platform validation, reconcile review, and perform exact-head Strikeforce before the separately authorized Shardblade permanence gate.
